title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The video argues that the USA faces a structural disadvantage in the AI race despite leading in chips and models, because China's centralized power infrastructure enables rapid buildout of hyperscale data centers while the US remains fragmented across regulatory jurisdictions. The author examines how major US tech companies work around grid constraints through behind-the-meter and off-grid solutions, and contrasts this with China's Eastern Data Western Compute strategy and extensive ultra-high voltage transmission networks.
